reviews.review_description:
I played this game a while back and wanted to share my thoughts as both a player and fellow developer. For context, I'm the creator of Lethal Ape on the Quest store (32k+ reviews), and I have deep respect for Schell Games' work, I've even studied Jesse Schell's The Art of Game Design. That's why I'm disappointed to say Project Freefall misses the mark significantly.

The issues are hard to overlook: all assets feel rushed with noticeably low-poly meshes, and the gameplay loop becomes repetitive within 20 minutes. There's basically no replayability to speak of. From a technical standpoint, the game also lacks basic security measures against modding on rooted Quest headsets.

As someone who admires Schell Games' previous titles, this feels like it was pushed out without the polish and thoughtful design I've come to expect from the studio. 

It sucks to say but im just being blunt; this game sucks even for being early access

I love the Schell Games company and their creations but this is a new low. I've seen great games made by this company and just to be given this. It feels sad to see 99% of this game be AI. For starters the shop shows these characters that blatantly look like they're made by ChatGPT and when you actually look at the skin in game its a sad, low quality mesh (which is probably also made by AI) of what they're advertising. The music is either AI as well or some boring stock music. I dont even think they hired a real voice to be the announcer. I'll say it again, I've seen amazing games from your company and just to see this slop come out of it is just sad. AI doesn't innovate or help, It's mainly destroying the idea of these games and instead of being creative they just pump out as much AI generated games as they can to make a quick buck. You're better than this and I know it.

Edit: I forgot to mention this. The "skins" they have are given again these cringy AI descriptions to give this game more "personality"

developer_response.body: Agent_Phoenix, thanks for the feedback! Our engineers, designers, and artists are working hard to create something different and fun. This game is still Early Access and we appreciate your thoughtful comments here as well as your input in our Discord. We're making regular updates, so please jump back in to let us know what you think.

reviews.review_title: Great fun, good community, and its free!
reviews.review_description: This game is pretty different and unique from previous schell games projects and while I was scared at first, it has proven to be a good game! I wish more people played it as its a very fun time. It receives a lot of updates and the community aspect that is being advertised is very much there as they have taken feedback and implemented much needed updates. Give it a try!
This game is fun but I feel like they could of do more in this game it kinda get boarding after 15 minutes

I tried on a few separate occasions to play this game.  But each time I was left stranded and floating around in some kind of lobby/waiting-room, waiting for a game to start.  I made sure that I had my "green checkmark" enabled to get a game to start...but after 15 minutes of wandering around the waiting room, I had to exit the app.  I tried this at least a few times, hoping that an actual game would begin, but I was the only one on the list waiting to play.  So I'm assuming that nobody besides me is trying to actually play this game.  I probably wasted about an hour TOTAL, among the separate occasions, waiting for an actual match begin, but nothing ever happened.  WTF?  My attempts spanned over about 2 weeks...but NOTHING.   Since absolutely NOTHING ever happened, I'm left with no option but to give this thing a 1-Star rating.  
I might as well uninstall this waste of space from my headset now.   
Garbage.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you had a bad experience in the game! It's likely you encountered a bug, you should be able to select a lobby with more players in it. Please check out our Community Hours for times when you can connect with even more players:

https://www.oculus.com/experiences/event/2076438813265001/
https://www.oculus.com/experiences/event/2076439939931555
